About DEKSA

Karaton Surakarta Hadiningrat is located in Indonesia. It has been in power for 279 years and is one of the greatest kingdoms in Southeast Asia.

We initiated project DEKSA (Digital Ecosystem Karaton Surakarta) to lead the mission to continue this success. Being the first to adopt the latest technology advancement is prove to show that we are also capable to become glorious in the upcoming age.

We will be present in the blockchain and web3 era. Bringing all our richness, stories, arts to the magical world of the digital universe.

Our Vision

"Become the leader of Javanese innovation through technology and be
the centre of Javanese hub globally"

Understand Through Story

Best way to understand history is through the stories itself.
Read our blog to learn about the project and it's enormous potential:

Story
Unveiling the Journey: DEKSA Team's Story

The DEKSA team’s journey highlights the importance of perseverance and dedication in historical preservation.
It was a journey through time itself.

Javanese
Where Javanese Culture Comes Alive

Karaton Surakarta is more than a monument; it’s a symbol of unity. It represents a shared history, a cultural identity that binds Indonesians together.

FAQs

Have some question? Here's some relatable question that might give you insight about the answer:

What is the cooperation agreement like?

This is an official collaboration. Even the entire board member of the DEKSA project consists of the royal family of the Surakarta Hadiningrat Palace

This is a collaboration between the generation of the family who legally serve as kings and the younger generation who master technology and its development

Detailed information about token?

The token was released in a quantity of 28,000,000. At the same time, to celebrate the 280th anniversary of the triumph of the Karaton Surakarta Hadiningrat.

The name MASA also has a strong history. At the beginning of the Surakarta kingdom era, transactions at that time used gold coins known as MASA coin.

How about the TGE?

Make sure to get your MASA token soon!

Because TGE will be coming in the 3rd quarter of 2024.

Can you share about token utility?

Our big dream is to continue the glory of the Karaton Surakarta Hadiningrat, one of which is to continue the wealth of its economic sector.

We will release a virtual kingdom complete with its virtual economy where fans and communities can earn, trade, and contribute to this ecosystem with $MASA token as it's medium.

Airdrop info ser?

Join DEKSA community telegram group for airdrop info!

Don't miss out!

Contact us on Telegram
